rationale: Ukraine's doubled logistics strikes represent a qualitative uptick relevant to Poland's eastern security watch, while Iran deal confusion continues without resolution.

top_events.title: Ukraine doubles attacks on Russian logistics, reclaims territory
top_events.summary: Ukraine's intensified logistics strikes mark a qualitative escalation step, relevant to Poland as a frontline NATO neighbor monitoring war trajectory and potential spillover.

top_events.title: Iran deal: Tehran says nothing finalized, Trump disputes leaked terms
top_events.summary: Continued Iran deal confusion keeps global energy market uncertainty alive, with indirect but modest effect on EU energy prices relevant to Polish consumers.

top_events.title: Ebola spreads into new areas of DR Congo
top_events.summary: Ebola expanding geographically in DRC is a distant health concern; no direct threat to Poland currently, but worth monitoring for EU-level response.
